diary_entries.entry: Another year. Underground cave system located. The colony feels hopeful. My paranoia grows stronger.
Year 62 on Mars. Underground cave system located. Morale is hopeful. We have 370 food units left.
Year 62 on Mars. Underground cave system located. Morale is hopeful. We have 370 food units left.

meta_awareness: Ares-18 (year 62): 'Today I realized: the output of Year 62 is the input to Year 63. We are being data-sloshed.'
